title: The TRUTH About Selling AI Automations to Businesses

extracted.hook: So, nobody's buying your AI agents or your AI workflows.
extracted.credential_drop: "I've spoken to hundreds of business owners." (late)
transitions: So, let's get started and take a look at the first reason why no one is buying from you.
Reason number two, no one cares about the AI.
The third reason no one's buying your AI agents is because you've got a massive misconception about what business owners value.
Fourth reason no one is buying your AI agents is because you're trying to be everything to everyone.
The fifth reason no one is buying your AI agents is because you're trying to sell like everyone else.
extracted.cta: "So, if you want to stand out, don't sell like everyone else. Execute differently, price differently, and think long-term." (mid)
analogies: "Think of yourself like a doctor. Patients don't show up to a hospital saying, 'I need ibuprofen.'"
"It's the same thing here. The free templates, all those random agents online, those are the over-the-counter ibuprofens."
extracted.vulnerability: "I was a 22-year-old kid who just quit his job and was hopping on calls with business owners and I had no idea how to speak their language." (late)

accelerates: discussing the importance of selling time, money, and focus
slows: explaining the concept of ROI in detail

frameworks: Reason number one, no one's buying your AI agents is because you're focusing too much on the what, not the how.
Reason number two, no one cares about the AI.
The third reason no one's buying your AI agents is because you've got a massive misconception about what business owners value.
Fourth reason no one is buying your AI agents is because you're trying to be everything to everyone.
The fifth reason no one is buying your AI agents is because you're trying to sell like everyone else.
